hooks-workers-evidence.note: INSTRUMENTED: ddd worker now runs fire-and-forget at session start (live-tested; statusline reads real ddd-progress.json). SIDE-FINDING: import('@monomind/hooks') never resolves from .claude/helpers (pnpm link only under CLI pkg) — the whole GAP-001 bridge was a silent no-op; ddd wire uses dist-path fallback. FLAG: 10 workers remain with no consumer + a bridge that doesn't resolve — @monomind/hooks package is deletion-review material for phase 5.

daemon-workers-evidence.note: INSTRUMENTED: headless AI worker results now persist to metrics/<worker>.json (schema-matched to readers incl. derived riskLevel); doctor warns on stalled daemon (state >24h with live pid). FLAG: no daemon has ever run in this repo — default-on question is a product call.

memory-learning-evidence.note: INSTRUMENTED: recall wire closed (init() before getContext — first non-null recall confirmed live); consolidate() now stores prompt+commit summaries with evidence-based confidence (0.5+0.2 commits+0.1 tests), filters build noise, dedupes; episodic injection dedupes + word-boundary truncation. FLAG: TS ReasoningBank (.monomind/neural) has still never written a byte here — only fires via MCP tools.

routing-outcome-evidence.note: INSTRUMENTED: sessionSuccess now defaults null (evidence-only booleans), labels slug-normalized, 'AI selecting' placeholder skipped, doctor falls back to routing-feedback.jsonl with honest degenerate-flag warning. Readers skip non-boolean records.

sparc-usage-evidence.note: DEAD confirmed and DELETED: 78 files (9,122 lines) + 40 reference files cleaned (~675 lines). Zero sparc matches remain in src/tests/scripts/.claude/CLAUDE.md.

cli-tail-trim.note: TRIMMED 10,656 lines: deleted workflow cmd+MCP tools (fabricated 'running' status), enrich (+pipeline), claims, issues (+claim-service 1213 ln), analyze boundaries/modules/dependencies/circular (admitted 'never shipped'), transfer-store top-level mount + fake genesis registry (invented 1000 downloads/5.0 rating) replaced with honest empty. CLI now 35 commands. Merge candidates deferred to phase 5: replay->session, neural->hooks, scan+search.

monograph-tool-tail.note: TRIMMED: 51 -> 19 default + 27 advanced (MONOGRAPH_MCP_ADVANCED=1) + 5 deleted (embed no-op, suggest_auto folded into suggest as checkStaleness, 3 redundant rerank variants). allMonographTools export keeps graphify shims safe. CLAUDE.md updated honestly.

npm-package-weight.note: TRIMMED: tarball 13.8MB/1806 files -> 10.7MB/1359. Removed dead root .claude copy + stale globs (.claude-plugin, bundled-graph) + runtime junk. FIXED BUGS: mastermind-skills added to SKILLS_MAP (installed commands referenced a skill users never got); sync-claude-assets.sh footgun guarded AND removed from prepublishOnly (was one drift away from wiping 21 skill dirs on publish).

prior_phases.phase1: 22 areas converged — deleted 27k lines of stubs, commit 31961cd5
prior_phases.phase2: 14 areas converged — wired D-grade layers to consumers, commit 6b890570
prior_phases.phase3: 8 areas converged — trimmed guidance/security/hive-mind/skills/commands, consolidated memory, ~46k more lines deleted; final commit 9eb148c5
prior_phases.phase4_trigger: Post-cleanup honest review: remaining risk is UNMEASURED features (workers, memory learning, routing outcomes, sparc, CLI tail, monograph tail, npm weight). Each must show evidence of user-visible effect or get trimmed/flagged.

phase4_summary: 8/8 areas evidenced and actioned in one run: 2 TRIMMED-large (sparc ~9.8k lines, cli-tail ~10.7k lines), 2 TRIMMED-surface (monograph tools, npm files), 4 INSTRUMENTED (routing signal, memory recall, daemon persistence, ddd statusline wire). Recurring root cause: consumers built, producers never ran. Flags for human: (1) @monomind/hooks package — bridge never resolves, 10/11 workers unconsumed; (2) daemon default-off with zero organic adoption; (3) CLI merge candidates (replay/neural/scan/search).
